    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addDrone(Drone) - Method in class model.DroneBase
    Adds a drone to this base.
    addDrone(Drone) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    addDroneBase(DroneBase) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    addHistoryEvent(String) - Method in class model.Mission
    Appends an event to the mission history log.
    addMedicalSite(MedicalSite) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    addMedicalStaff(MedicalStaff) - Method in class model.MapModel
    Adds a medical staff member and registers them as a UserPoint at their hospital position, so Voronoi statistics count them.
    addOrganType(String) - Method in class model.CollectionCenter
    Adds an organ type to the center.
    addPoint(Position) - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
    Adds a grid point to this Voronoi cell.
    addRandomUserPoints(int, double, double, double, double) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    addTriangle(Triangle) - Method in class model.DelaunayTriangulation
     
    addUserPoint(UserPoint) - Method in class model.MapModel
     
    addUserPoint(UserPoint) - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
    Assigns a user point (doctor) to this Voronoi cell.
    addVertex(Position) - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
     
    addWaypoint(Position) - Method in class model.Route
    Adds an intermediate waypoint to the route.
    app - package app
     
    areDelaunayNeighbours(CollectionCenter, Hospital) - Method in class service.OptimizationService
    Returns true if the collection center and the hospital share a Delaunay edge, i.e. they appear together in at least one triangle.
    ASSIGNED - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.MissionStatus
     
    ASSIGNED - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.RequestStatus
     
    assignNearestSite(MedicalSite) - Method in class model.UserPoint
    Assigns the nearest medical site to this user point (computed by Voronoi).
    AVAILABLE - Enum constant in enum class model.enums.DroneStatus
